lines.english: Why do you talk such nonsense, trying to convince others?
You hold back in fear, and are not approved by the Lord.
JHAJHA: You are entangled in the world, and you do not know how to get untangled.
Stirring up arguments, you shall only obtain more arguments. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਞੰਞਾ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਜੁ ਘਟ ਰਹਿਓ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਹਾ ਤਜਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: yanyaa nikatt ju ghatt rahio door kahaa taj jaae |
lines.english: NYANYA: He dwells near you, deep within your heart; why do you leave Him and go far away?
TATTA: It is such a difficult path, to find Him within your own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਲਿ ਕਪਾਟ ਮਹਲਿ ਕਿ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: khol kapaatt mehal ki na jaahee |
lines.english: Open the doors within, and enter the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਜਗੁ ਢੂਢਿਅਉ ਨੇਰਉ ਪਾਇਅਉ ਤਾਹਿ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: jaa kaaran jag dtoodtiaau nerau paaeaau taeh |16|
lines.english: I searched the whole world for Him, but I found Him near myself. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਅਟਲ ਟਲਿ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: dekh attal ttal kateh na jaavaa |
lines.english: Beholding the Immovable Lord, you shall not slip and go anywhere else.
You shall remain firmly attached to the Lord, and your heart will be happy. ||17||
T'HAT'HA: Keep yourself far away from this mirage.
With great difficulty, I have calmed my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਠਗੁ ਠਗਿਆ ਠਉਰ ਮਨੁ ਆਵਾ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: so tthag tthagiaa tthaur man aavaa |18|
lines.english: - I have cheated that cheater, and my mind is now at peace. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਠਗਿ ਠਗਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਜਗੁ ਖਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin tthag tthagiaa sagal jag khaavaa |
lines.english: That cheater, who cheated and devoured the whole world

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਡਰ ਮਹਿ ਡਰੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa ddar meh ddar rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: Other fears are absorbed into that Fear.
DADDA: When the Fear of God wells up, other fears depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਡਰ ਹੂਆ ਡਰੁ ਉਰ ਹੋਇ ਭਾਗੈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: niddar hooaa ddar ur hoe bhaagai |19|
lines.english: But if he becomes fearless, the fears of his heart run away. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਡਰ ਡਰੈ ਤ ਫਿਰਿ ਡਰੁ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jau ddar ddarai ta fir ddar laagai |
lines.english: When one rejects the Fear of God, then other fears cling to him.
DHADHA: Why do you search in other directions?
When I returned after climbing the mountain,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਗੜੁ ਗੜਿਓ ਸੁ ਗੜ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਵਾ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: jih garr garrio su garr meh paavaa |20|
lines.english: I found Him in the fortress - the fortress which He Himself made. ||20||
Searching for Him like this, the breath of life runs out.
who conquers the one and renounces the many. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾਣਾ ਰਣਿ ਰੂਤਉ ਨਰ ਨੇਹੀ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanaa ran rootau nar nehee karai |
lines.english: NANNA: The warrior who fights on the battle-field should keep up and press on.
Blessed is the coming of one
He should not yield, and he should not retreat.
the body remains embroiled in the three worlds.
TATTA: The impassable world-ocean cannot be crossed over;
But when the Lord of the three worlds enters into the body,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਅਥਾਹ ਇਹੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਨ ਰਹਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: ohu athaah ihu thir na rahaavaa |
lines.english: He is Unfathomable; this body is impermanent, and unstable.
T'HAT'HA: He is Unfathomable; His depths cannot be fathomed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਤਤਹਿ ਤਤ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵਾ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: tau tateh tat miliaa sach paavaa |22|
lines.english: then one's essence merges with the essence of reality, and the True Lord is attained. ||22||
DADDA: Whatever is seen shall perish.
without any pillars, he wishes to support a mansion. ||23||
The mortal builds his dwelling upon this tiny space;
then the Blessed Vision of the Merciful Lord's Darshan is seen. ||24||
Contemplate the One who is unseen.
When the key is inserted in the Tenth Gate,
Leaving the earth, the soul ascends to the heavens;
DHADHA: When one ascends from the lower realms of the earth to the higher realms of the heavens, then everything is resolved.
The Lord dwells in both the lower and higher worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਅਰਧਹਿ ਉਰਧ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਾ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: tau aradheh uradh miliaa sukh paavaa |25|
lines.english: then, the lower and higher join together, and peace is obtained. ||25||
NANNA: The days and nights go by; I am looking for the Lord.
Looking for Him, my eyes have become blood-shot.
then the one who was looking merges into the One who was looked for. ||26||
PAPPA: He is limitless; His limits cannot be found.
After looking and looking,when He is finally found,
I have attuned myself to the Supreme Light.
One who controls his five senses
rises above both sin and virtue. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਫਲ ਫੰਕ ਸਭੈ ਤਨ ਫਾਰੈ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: taa fal fank sabhai tan faarai |28|
lines.english: A slice of that fruit slices all bodies. ||28||
FAFFA: Even without the flower, the fruit is produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਫਲ ਫੰਕ ਲਖੈ ਜਉ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa fal fank lakhai jau koee |
lines.english: One who looks at a slice of that fruit
and reflects on it, will not be consigned to reincarnation.
BABBA: When one drop blends with another drop,
then these drops cannot be separated again.
Become the Lord's slave, and hold tight to His meditation.
